text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Among the voices rooting for Ines Fujin to win the
Satsuki Sho, one resonates in particular. A certain
fan is cheering her on because they want to see
their dream in her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Around this time, Ines Fujin receives some
encouragement from her younger sisters—whom
she imagines are dancing their hearts out—and
her morale gets a huge boost.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Satsuki Sho arrives. With Ines
Fujin's popularity surging, the number of
opponents ready to mark her is probably on the
rise too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Among those opponents is her friend, Mejiro
Ryan. The two burn with a passionate rivalry as
the curtains rise on a sparking hot Satsuki Sho!
